3107940.name: Maniac Path 3
3107940.description:
Go into the abyss of madness to go through the difficult path of a broken beast that spares no one. You will find yourself in the guise of a maniac trying to escape from the crime scene and run as far as possible. In your arsenal there is a knife and a firearm that will help you deal with those who are in your way as effectively as possible. The police and the national guard are powerless before you. Escape the city, getting rid of everyone who is hunting you! Be careful, enemies can attack not only in close combat, but also with long-range attacks! Your path is crazy and uncompromising.

Game genre - survival

Game Features:

  • Dynamic gameplay

  • Many enemies

  • Beautiful graphics
